final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×3 character expression grid illustration featuring 赵灵儿 from 仙剑奇侠传 as the thematic inspiration.

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation Pixar-style aesthetic — exact rendering and surface execution is yours
Composition: must be a 3×3 grid layout with 9 equal panels, each character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include all 9 panels with 赵灵儿-inspired young woman character (long flowing hair, delicate features, ethereal charm) across all panels:
  Top-left: winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  Top-center: smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: must include torn white paper hole as the framing device for each panel
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, lively and expressive atmosphere — exact light setup is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, varied direction matching each panel's outfit color — exact palette ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished 3D rendered surface feel — exact sheen and texture weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all 9 panels in correct grid positions; each panel must show a distinct expression and action as listed; character must remain visually consistent across all 9 panels
Avoid:
